identity.title: PA Compression Macro
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets output and metric transition smoothing

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst logic threshold

parameters.name: gain
parameters.override_behavior: sets the moderate-drive voltage gain about 0.45 V common mode

properties.observable_contract: Initialization or active reset returns out to 0.45 V common mode and clears metric to 0 V.
Out and metric update from the sampled signed drive vin - 0.45 V on rising clk crossings and hold between updates.
When 0.45 V + gain*(vin - 0.45 V) lies from 0.12 V through 0.78 V, out equals that target and metric is 0.1 V.
Targets above 0.78 V or below 0.12 V are compressed with slope 0.18 about the corresponding boundary, and metric is 0.85 V.
The compressed output remains within 0.02 V through 0.88 V with finite transition smoothing.

modeling_constraints: Use voltage contributions only and smooth discontinuous output targets.
Do not add undeclared artifacts, ports, test hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.
